segments.label: Forcefield
segments.title: 1 · Hook
segments.hint: Record this LAST — it's a 10–15s montage. Screen-record yourself flipping through the app's best screens (map full of pins, squad page, chat drawer, leaderboard) and talk over what Forcefield is.
bullets: What Forcefield is — door-to-door canvassing for Union County in one app
Replaces the clipboard-and-spreadsheet mess
Teaser: live map, squads, chat, leaderboards

segments.label: Talk mode
segments.title: 2 · Talk mode
segments.hint: Search a street, tap a result to load the household, tap a resident, log Signed, hit Next, then show the Up-next grid at the bottom and tap a chip.
bullets: Talk mode: search any address, the whole household appears
One-tap outcomes — a signature is credited to a specific person
Next walks you down the street; Up-next queues the coming 4 doors
Works offline — knocks queue and sync when signal returns

segments.label: Scout
segments.title: 3 · Scout map
segments.hint: Map segment — drive it yourself. Flip from Talk to Scout (it auto-orients on your door), pan the colored pins, tap one to show the signed ratio, zoom in until house numbers appear.
bullets: Scout: the whole turf at a glance
Every door color-coded — green everyone signed, yellow partial, red no, blue untouched
Tap a pin: exact signed ratio + knock button
Zoom in and house numbers appear on the pins

segments.label: Squad
segments.title: 4 · Squad page
segments.hint: Map segment. For the live pin-pop: keep a second browser window logged in as a sim canvasser and log a knock mid-take — the pin pops and their avatar lands on the door.
bullets: Squad page: the crew's home base — cards with avatar, color, last 5 doors
Shared map + 'Our turf' progress bar
Live: pins pop as squadmates knock, avatars mark today's doors
Tap a member to jump to where they are

segments.label: Chat
segments.title: 5 · Chat
segments.hint: Pull the orange handle from the right edge, show the room list, open a room, send a message, add a reaction.
bullets: Chat is one pull away, from any screen
Everyone room, squad rooms, DMs
Reactions and image attachments

segments.label: Assign doors
segments.title: 6 · Assign doors
segments.hint: Map segment. On /squad tap 'Assign doors' on a member card, tap one door then another a few houses down — the run between lights up — then Save.
bullets: Splitting turf takes seconds
Tap two doors — every house between them sweeps in, even around a corner
Save: the doors wear that member's color

segments.label: Activity feed
segments.title: 7 · Activity feed
segments.hint: Open /activity. Show the 'Today so far' strip, scroll the live feed, point out a milestone banner.
bullets: The whole campaign as a live scoreboard
Today-so-far strip: doors and signatures
Milestones hype the team automatically

segments.label: Leaderboard + AI
segments.title: 8 · Leaderboard + AI
segments.hint: Show /leaderboard standings, then use the header role badge (demo switcher) to hop to Campaign Manager and ask the /admin AI a question you already know the answer to.
bullets: Leaderboards: canvassers and squads, browsable by day
For managers: a built-in AI analyst with live database access
Ask in plain English, get real numbers back

segments.label: Make it yours
segments.title: 9 · Personalize + close
segments.hint: Quick flashes: /appearance theme swap ('80s Neon reads great on camera), /profile emoji + color sheets, then hold on the home screen for the CTA.
bullets: 18 themes, patterns, readability controls — make it yours
Pick your emoji and accent color
forcefield.ninja — built for the field, built for the team
